creator: code.jpe@gmail.com
text:
Correction: the 10.1-RC3 r273607 just panic'ed as well. It just took a lot longer. The panic message was, as far as I could see from the corner of my eye, the same call sequence.

This will make it easier if any of you require something from me, since the 10.3 is under my desk. I'll try to get a core from that one tomorrow as well if required.


Regards,
  Joerg
